top3.sql:
SELECT superhero_name
FROM superhero
WHERE eye_colour_id = (SELECT id FROM colour WHERE colour = 'black')
  AND hair_colour_id = (SELECT id FROM colour WHERE colour = 'black');

SELECT s.superhero_name
FROM superhero s
JOIN colour e ON s.eye_colour_id = e.id
JOIN colour h ON s.hair_colour_id = h.id
WHERE e.colour = 'black' AND h.colour = 'black';

SELECT superhero_name
FROM superhero
WHERE eye_colour_id = (SELECT id FROM colour WHERE colour = 'black')
  AND hair_colour_id = (SELECT id FROM colour WHERE colour = 'black');

SELECT s.superhero_name
FROM superhero s
JOIN colour e ON s.eye_colour_id = e.id
JOIN colour h ON s.hair_colour_id = h.id
WHERE e.colour = 'black' AND h.colour = 'black';

SELECT s.superhero_name
FROM superhero s
INNER JOIN colour e ON s.eye_colour_id = e.id
INNER JOIN colour h ON s.hair_colour_id = h.id
WHERE LOWER(e.colour) = 'black' AND LOWER(h.colour) = 'black';

  AND hair_colour_id = (SELECT id FROM colour WHERE colour = 'black');

WHERE e.colour = 'black' AND h.colour = 'black';

INNER JOIN colour h ON s.hair_colour_id = h.id
WHERE LOWER(e.colour) = 'black' AND LOWER(h.colour) = 'black';

final.sql:
SELECT superhero_name
FROM superhero
WHERE eye_colour_id = (SELECT id FROM colour WHERE colour = 'black')
  AND hair_colour_id = (SELECT id FROM colour WHERE colour = 'black');
